    <script>
        const generateId = () => Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9);
        
        const RATIOS = {
            '1:1': { width: 1080, height: 1080, label: 'Square' },
            '4:5': { width: 1080, height: 1350, label: 'Portrait' },
        };

        const DEFAULT_COLORS = [
            '#000000', '#FFFFFF', '#18181b', '#27272a',
            '#f87171', '#fb923c', '#fbbf24', '#facc15',
            '#a3e635', '#4ade80', '#34d399', '#2dd4bf',
            '#38bdf8', '#60a5fa', '#818cf8', '#a78bfa',
            '#c084fc', '#e879f9', '#f472b6', '#fb7185'
        ];

        const FALLBACK_PALETTE = [
            '#f87171', '#fb923c', '#fbbf24', '#a3e635', '#38bdf8', '#818cf8'
        ];

        let dynamicPalette = [];

        const state = {
            elements: [],
            activeElementId: null,
            slideCount: 3,
            ratio: '4:5',
            activePanel: null,
            viewScale: 1,
            panX: 0, 
            isCropping: false,
            currentLayout: null,
            pickingSlice: null,
            isPickingColor: false
        };

        let appConfig = {};
        let gestureState = {
            mode: 'none', 
            offsetX: 0, offsetY: 0, 
            initialEl: null,
            startDist: 0,
            startAngle: 0,
            handle: null,
            startPanX: 0,
            startClientX: 0,
            startScale: 1,
            pinchCenter: { x: 0, y: 0 }
        };
        
        let wasCanvasPanning = false;

        // --- Custom Color Picker Logic ---
        let cpState = { hue: 0, sat: 0, val: 100, callback: null };

        function initColorPicker() {
            const satArea = document.getElementById('cp-saturation');
            const hueRail = document.getElementById('cp-hue');
            const hexInput = document.getElementById('cp-hex-input');
            const closeBtn = document.getElementById('cp-close');
            const applyBtn = document.getElementById('cp-apply');
            const eyedropperBtn = document.getElementById('cp-eyedropper');

            const updateFromHSV = () => {
                const rgb = hsvToRgb(cpState.hue, cpState.sat, cpState.val);
                const hex = rgbToHex(rgb[0], rgb[1], rgb[2]);
                
                satArea.style.background = `hsl(${cpState.hue}, 100%, 50%)`;
                document.getElementById('cp-preview').style.background = hex;
                hexInput.value = hex.replace('#', '');
                
                const satX = cpState.sat;
                const satY = 100 - cpState.val;
                document.getElementById('cp-s-cursor').style.left = `${satX}%`;
                document.getElementById('cp-s-cursor').style.top = `${satY}%`;
                
                const hueX = (cpState.hue / 360) * 100;
                document.getElementById('cp-h-thumb').style.left = `${hueX}%`;

                if(cpState.callback) cpState.callback(hex);
            };

            const handleSatDrag = (e) => {
                const rect = satArea.getBoundingClientRect();
                const x = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, (e.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width));
                const y = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, (e.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height));
                cpState.sat = x * 100;
                cpState.val = (1 - y) * 100;
                updateFromHSV();
            };

            const handleHueDrag = (e) => {
                const rect = hueRail.getBoundingClientRect();
                const x = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, (e.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width));
                cpState.hue = x * 360;
                updateFromHSV();
            };

            satArea.addEventListener('pointerdown', (e) => {
                e.preventDefault();
                handleSatDrag(e);
                const move = (ev) => handleSatDrag(ev);
                const up = () => { document.removeEventListener('pointermove', move); document.removeEventListener('pointerup', up); };
                document.addEventListener('pointermove', move);
                document.addEventListener('pointerup', up);
            });

            hueRail.addEventListener('pointerdown', (e) => {
                e.preventDefault();
                handleHueDrag(e);
                const move = (ev) => handleHueDrag(ev);
                const up = () => { document.removeEventListener('pointermove', move); document.removeEventListener('pointerup', up); };
                document.addEventListener('pointermove', move);
                document.addEventListener('pointerup', up);
            });

            hexInput.addEventListener('change', (e) => {
                const hex = '#' + e.target.value.replace('#', '');
                if(/^#[0-9A-F]{6}$/i.test(hex)) {
                    const [h, s, v] = hexToHsv(hex);
                    cpState.hue = h; cpState.sat = s; cpState.val = v;
                    updateFromHSV();
                }
            });

            eyedropperBtn.onclick = startEyedropper;

            closeBtn.onclick = () => document.getElementById('color-picker-modal').classList.remove('open');
            applyBtn.onclick = () => document.getElementById('color-picker-modal').classList.remove('open');

            window.openColorPicker = (initialColor, cb) => {
                cpState.callback = cb;
                if(initialColor && initialColor.startsWith('#')) {
                    const [h, s, v] = hexToHsv(initialColor);
                    cpState.hue = h; cpState.sat = s; cpState.val = v;
                } else {
                    cpState.hue = 0; cpState.sat = 0; cpState.val = 100; 
                }
                updateFromHSV();
                document.getElementById('color-picker-modal').classList.add('open');
            };
        }

        // --- Eyedropper Logic ---
        let eyedropperSnapshotCanvas = null;
        let originalColorForPicker = null;

        function startEyedropper() {
            state.isPickingColor = true;
            state.lastActivePanel = state.activePanel; // Remember where we came from
            
            // Capture original color from input to allow revert
            const hexInput = document.getElementById('cp-hex-input');
            originalColorForPicker = '#' + hexInput.value;

            // Prepare snapshot of canvas for sampling
            // We do this to avoid sampling UI elements or the changing background itself causing feedback loops
            const { width: slideW, height: slideH } = RATIOS[state.ratio];
            const totalW = slideW * state.slideCount;
            
            eyedropperSnapshotCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
            eyedropperSnapshotCanvas.width = totalW;
            eyedropperSnapshotCanvas.height = slideH;
            const ctx = eyedropperSnapshotCanvas.getContext('2d');
            
            // Fill default background
            ctx.fillStyle = '#000000';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, totalW, slideH);

            // Render current state to snapshot
            drawElementsToContext(ctx).then(() => {
                // Hide UI
                document.getElementById('color-picker-modal').classList.remove('open');
                document.querySelectorAll('.panel').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
                document.getElementById('workspace').classList.add('picking');
                
                // Show Action Bar
                document.getElementById('eyedropper-bar').classList.remove('hidden');

                // Listener for clicks only
                const workspace = document.getElementById('workspace');
                // We use capture to intercept before other click handlers if needed, 
                // but standard bubble is fine as long as we check valid target
                workspace.addEventListener('click', handleEyedropperClick);
            });
        }

        function handleEyedropperClick(e) {
            // If we panned, do not sample
            if (wasCanvasPanning) return;
            // Ignore UI clicks
            if(e.target.closest('#eyedropper-bar') || e.target.closest('.quick-actions')) return;

            e.preventDefault();
            e.stopPropagation();

            const workspace = document.getElementById('workspace');
            const rect = document.getElementById('canvas-container').getBoundingClientRect();
            
            // Calculate canvas coordinates
            const scale = state.viewScale;
            
            const relX = (e.clientX - rect.left) / scale;
            const relY = (e.clientY - rect.top) / scale;
            
            const pX = Math.floor(Math.max(0, Math.min(eyedropperSnapshotCanvas.width - 1, relX)));
            const pY = Math.floor(Math.max(0, Math.min(eyedropperSnapshotCanvas.height - 1, relY)));

            // Sample Color
            const ctx = eyedropperSnapshotCanvas.getContext('2d');
            const pixel = ctx.getImageData(pX, pY, 1, 1).data;
            const hex = rgbToHex(pixel[0], pixel[1], pixel[2]);

            // Update Loupe
            const loupe = document.getElementById('eyedropper-loupe');
            loupe.classList.add('active');
            loupe.style.left = `${e.clientX}px`;
            loupe.style.top = `${e.clientY - 60}px`; // Shift up so finger doesn't block
            loupe.style.transform = 'translate(-50%, -50%)';
            loupe.style.backgroundColor = hex;
            loupe.style.borderColor = hex === '#FFFFFF' ? '#ddd' : 'white';

            // Apply Color Live
            if(cpState.callback) {
                cpState.callback(hex);
                // We need to update internal picker state too so "Confirm" knows what it is
                const [h, s, v] = hexToHsv(hex);
                cpState.hue = h; cpState.sat = s; cpState.val = v;
            }
        }

        function stopEyedropperInteraction() {
            document.getElementById('eyedropper-loupe').classList.remove('active');
        }

        function closeEyedropperMode(apply) {
        state.isPickingColor = false;
        document.getElementById('eyedropper-bar').classList.add('hidden');
        document.getElementById('workspace').classList.remove('picking');
        
        // Explicitly remove the loupe
        const loupe = document.getElementById('eyedropper-loupe');
        loupe.classList.remove('active');
        loupe.style.display = 'none'; // Force hide
        setTimeout(() => { loupe.style.display = ''; }, 50);
        
        // --- FIX START ---
        // Previously: document.removeEventListener(...) which failed to remove the listener
        document.getElementById('workspace').removeEventListener('click', handleEyedropperClick);
        // --- FIX END ---
        
        if (apply) {
        // Confirm: Just exit mode.
        state.activePanel = null;
        updateUI();
        } else {
        // Cancel: Revert and Go Back
        if (cpState.callback && originalColorForPicker) {
        cpState.callback(originalColorForPicker);
        const [h, s, v] = hexToHsv(originalColorForPicker);
        cpState.hue = h; cpState.sat = s; cpState.val = v;
        }
        
        // Restore the panel state and open the modal.
        if(state.lastActivePanel) {
        state.activePanel = state.lastActivePanel;
        updateUI();
        }
        
        // Open modal with reverted color
        const colorToOpen = originalColorForPicker;
        window.openColorPicker(colorToOpen, cpState.callback);
        }
        }

        document.getElementById('ed-confirm').onclick = () => closeEyedropperMode(true);
        document.getElementById('ed-cancel').onclick = () => closeEyedropperMode(false);

        // Extracted drawing logic for reuse
        async function drawElementsToContext(ctx) {
            const sorted = [...state.elements].sort((a,b) => (a.zIndex||0) - (b.zIndex||0));
            
            for (const el of sorted) {
                if (el.isPlaceholder) continue;
                ctx.save();
                const cx = el.x + el.width/2;
                const cy = el.y + el.height/2;
                ctx.translate(cx, cy);
                ctx.rotate((el.rotation || 0) * Math.PI / 180);
                ctx.translate(-el.width/2, -el.height/2);
                
                if (el.type === 'image') {
                    const img = new Image();
                    img.crossOrigin = "anonymous";
                    img.src = el.src;
                    await new Promise((resolve) => {
                        if (img.complete) resolve();
                        else img.onload = resolve;
                        img.onerror = resolve; // Continue on error
                    });
                    
                    const cropX = el.cropX !== undefined ? el.cropX : 50;
                    const cropY = el.cropY !== undefined ? el.cropY : 50;
                    const zoom = el.cropZoom || 1;
                    
                    // Basic calc
                    const imgRatio = img.width / img.height;
                    const boxRatio = el.width / el.height;
                    let drawW, drawH;
                    if (imgRatio > boxRatio) {
                        drawH = el.height;
                        drawW = img.width * (el.height / img.height);
                    } else {
                        drawW = el.width;
                        drawH = img.height * (el.width / img.width);
                    }
                    drawW *= zoom;
                    drawH *= zoom;
                    
                    ctx.beginPath();
                    ctx.rect(0, 0, el.width, el.height);
                    ctx.clip();
                    
                    const offsetX = (el.width - drawW) * (cropX / 100);
                    const offsetY = (el.height - drawH) * (cropY / 100);
                    ctx.drawImage(img, offsetX, offsetY, drawW, drawH);
                } else if (el.type === 'text') {
                     ctx.font = `${el.fontSize}px ${el.fontFamily || 'sans-serif'}`;
                     ctx.fillStyle = el.color;
                     ctx.textBaseline = 'top';
                     ctx.textAlign = 'center';
                     const lines = el.content.split('\n');
                     const lh = el.fontSize * 1.2;
                     const totalH = lines.length * lh;
                     const startY = (el.height - totalH) / 2;
                     lines.forEach((line, i) => {
                         ctx.fillText(line, el.width/2, startY + (i * lh));
                     });
                } else if (el.type === 'shape') {
                    ctx.fillStyle = el.bg;
                    ctx.fillRect(0,0, el.width, el.height);
                }
                ctx.restore();
            }
        }

        // Color Helpers
        function hsvToRgb(h, s, v) {
            s /= 100; v /= 100;
            let f= (n,k=(n+h/60)%6) => v - v*s*Math.max( Math.min(k,4-k,1), 0);
            return [f(5)*255, f(3)*255, f(1)*255];
        }
        function rgbToHex(r, g, b) {
            return "#" + ((1 << 24) + (Math.round(r) << 16) + (Math.round(g) << 8) + Math.round(b)).toString(16).slice(1).toUpperCase();
        }
        function hexToHsv(hex) {
            let r = 0, g = 0, b = 0;
            if (hex.length == 4) {
                r = "0x" + hex[1] + hex[1]; g = "0x" + hex[2] + hex[2]; b = "0x" + hex[3] + hex[3];
            } else if (hex.length == 7) {
                r = "0x" + hex[1] + hex[2]; g = "0x" + hex[3] + hex[4]; b = "0x" + hex[5] + hex[6];
            }
            r /= 255; g /= 255; b /= 255;
            let cmin = Math.min(r,g,b), cmax = Math.max(r,g,b), delta = cmax - cmin;
            let h = 0, s = 0, v = 0;
            if (delta == 0) h = 0;
            else if (cmax == r) h = ((g - b) / delta) % 6;
            else if (cmax == g) h = (b - r) / delta + 2;
            else h = (r - g) / delta + 4;
            h = Math.round(h * 60);
            if (h < 0) h += 360;
            v = Math.round(cmax * 100);
            s = cmax == 0 ? 0 : Math.round((delta / cmax) * 100);
            return [h, s, v];
        }

        window.myop_init_interface = function(config) {
            console.log('Initializing Interface...', config);
            appConfig = config || {};
            
            if (config.defaults) {
                state.slideCount = config.defaults.slideCount || 3;
                state.ratio = config.defaults.ratio || '4:5';
            }
            
            if (config.fonts && Array.isArray(config.fonts)) {
                const style = document.createElement('style');
                let css = '';
                config.fonts.forEach(font => {
                    css += `@font-face { font-family: '${font.name}'; src: url('${font.url}') format('woff2'); }`;
                });
                style.textContent = css;
                document.head.appendChild(style);
            }
            
            initColorPicker(); // INIT CUSTOM PICKER
            renderProjectImages(); 
            // 1. Initial Render (empty canvas background)
            renderCanvas();
            renderGuides();
            updateUI();
            setupInteractionHandlers();
            setupWorkspacePan();
            
            // NEW: Calculate Initial Scale to Fit Screen
            fitCanvasToScreen();

            // 2. IMPORTANT: Apply Default Layout immediately so canvas is not empty
            // Use 'editorial' as default or whatever is preferred
            setTimeout(() => {
                applyLayout('editorial');
                togglePanel('layouts'); // Then open the panel for user
            }, 100);
        };
        
        // NEW: Helper to Fit Canvas to Screen on Init
        function fitCanvasToScreen() {
             const { width, height } = RATIOS[state.ratio];
             const totalWidth = width * state.slideCount;
             const workspace = document.getElementById('workspace');
             const availW = workspace.clientWidth;
             const availH = workspace.clientHeight;
             
             // Add some padding (0.9 factor)
             const scaleW = (availW * 0.9) / totalWidth;
             const scaleH = (availH * 0.9) / height;
             
             // Fit entire width or height, whichever is smaller
             state.viewScale = Math.min(scaleW, scaleH);
             // Center panning
             state.panX = 0; 
             renderCanvas();
        }
        
        function renderProjectImages() {
            const container = document.getElementById('project-images-container');
            const list = document.getElementById('project-images-list');
            
            if (appConfig.images && appConfig.images.length > 0) {
                container.classList.remove('hidden');
                list.innerHTML = '';
                appConfig.images.forEach(url => {
                    const img = document.createElement('img');
                    img.src = url;
                    img.className = 'picker-img';
                    img.onclick = () => addImageToCanvas(url);
                    list.appendChild(img);
                });
            } else {
                container.classList.add('hidden');
            }
        }
        
        function addImageToCanvas(url) {
            const img = new Image();
            img.crossOrigin = "anonymous"; 

            img.onload = () => {
                const bestSlideIndex = findBestSliceForImage(); 
                
                const { width, height } = RATIOS[state.ratio];
                const scale = Math.min(width/img.width, height/img.height) * 0.8;
                
                const placeholderIndex = state.elements.findIndex(el => el.isPlaceholder);
                
                if (placeholderIndex !== -1) {
                    const ph = state.elements[placeholderIndex];
                    state.elements[placeholderIndex] = {
                        id: generateId(), 
                        type: 'image', 
                        src: url,
                        x: ph.x, 
                        y: ph.y, 
                        width: ph.width, 
                        height: ph.height,
                        rotation: 0, 
                        zIndex: ph.zIndex, 
                        cropX: 50, 
                        cropY: 50, 
                        cropZoom: 1
                    };
                } else {
                    const xPos = (bestSlideIndex * width) + (width - (img.width*scale))/2;
                    const maxZ = state.elements.length > 0 ? Math.max(...state.elements.map(el => el.zIndex || 0)) : 0;
                    
                    state.elements.push({
                        id: generateId(), 
                        type: 'image', 
                        src: url,
                        x: xPos, 
                        y: (height - (img.height*scale))/2,
                        width: img.width * scale, 
                        height: img.height * scale, 
                        rotation: 0, 
                        zIndex: maxZ + 10, 
                        cropX: 50, 
                        cropY: 50, 
                        cropZoom: 1
                    });
                }
                
                renderCanvas();
                closePanels(); 
            };

            img.onerror = (e) => {
                console.error("Error loading project image.", url, e);
                alert("Could not load image.");
            };

            img.src = url;
        }

        window.myop_cta_handler = function(action_id, payload) {
            console.log(`[CTA HANDLER] Action: ${action_id}`, payload);
        };

        function autoMeasureText(el) {
            const measure = document.createElement('div');
            measure.style.position = 'absolute';
            measure.style.visibility = 'hidden';
            measure.style.whiteSpace = 'pre';
            measure.style.fontFamily = el.fontFamily || 'sans-serif';
            measure.style.fontSize = `${el.fontSize}px`;
            measure.style.lineHeight = '1.2';
            measure.style.padding = '4px'; 
            measure.textContent = el.content;
            document.body.appendChild(measure);
            el.width = measure.offsetWidth + 10;
            el.height = measure.offsetHeight + 10;
            document.body.removeChild(measure);
        }

        function getActiveSliceIndex() {
            const { width } = RATIOS[state.ratio];
            const totalWidth = width * state.slideCount;
            const centerInCanvas = (totalWidth / 2) - (state.panX / state.viewScale);
            const index = Math.floor(centerInCanvas / width);
            return Math.max(0, Math.min(state.slideCount - 1, index));
        }
        
        function scrollToSlice(index) {
            const { width } = RATIOS[state.ratio];
            const totalWidth = width * state.slideCount;
            const targetPanX = ((totalWidth / 2) - (index * width + width / 2)) * state.viewScale;
            state.panX = targetPanX;
            renderCanvas();
        }

        function findBestSliceForImage() {
            const { width } = RATIOS[state.ratio];
            const counts = new Array(state.slideCount).fill(0);
            state.elements.forEach(el => {
                if(el.type !== 'image') return;
                const idx = Math.floor((el.x + el.width/2) / width);
                if(idx >=0 && idx < state.slideCount) counts[idx]++;
            });
            return counts.indexOf(Math.min(...counts));
        }

        // --- NEW: DYNAMIC PALETTE GENERATION ---
        async function generateDynamicPalette() {
            const images = state.elements.filter(el => el.type === 'image');
            const extracted = [];
            
            // Helper to get simple representative color (center pixel)
            const getColor = (imgSrc) => {
                return new Promise(resolve => {
                    const img = new Image();
                    img.crossOrigin = "anonymous";
                    img.src = imgSrc;
                    img.onload = () => {
                        const c = document.createElement('canvas');
                        c.width = 1; c.height = 1;
                        const ctx = c.getContext('2d');
                        ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0, 1, 1);
                        const p = ctx.getImageData(0,0,1,1).data;
                        resolve(rgbToHex(p[0], p[1], p[2]));
                    };
                    img.onerror = () => resolve(null);
                });
            }

            // Extract from up to 6 images
            for(const el of images.slice(0, 6)) {
                const color = await getColor(el.src);
                if(color && !extracted.includes(color)) extracted.push(color);
            }

            let palette = ['#FFFFFF', '#000000', ...extracted];
            
            // If we have fewer than 8 total colors (2 base + 6 dynamic), fill with fallback
            // Target is 8 colors max or strictly 2 + 6 slots.
            // If no images => White, Black + 6 Fallback
            // If images => White, Black + Extracted + Fill with Fallback if needed
            
            let fillIdx = 0;
            const fallback = appConfig.defaultPalette || FALLBACK_PALETTE;
            
            while(palette.length < 8 && fillIdx < fallback.length) {
                const c = fallback[fillIdx++];
                if(!palette.includes(c)) palette.push(c);
            }
            
            return palette.slice(0, 8);
        }

        async function updatePalette() {
            dynamicPalette = await generateDynamicPalette();
            renderColors(dynamicPalette);
        }

        function renderColors(colors) {
            const container = document.getElementById('global-colors');
            container.innerHTML = '';
            
            for(let i=0; i<state.slideCount; i++) {
                const bgEl = state.elements.find(e => e.isBackground && e.sliceIndex === i);
                const currentBg = bgEl ? bgEl.bg : '#000000';

                const row = document.createElement('div');
                row.className = 'color-row-item';

                const label = document.createElement('div');
                label.className = 'color-row-label';
                label.innerText = `SLICE 0${i+1}`;
                row.appendChild(label);

                const palette = document.createElement('div');
                palette.className = 'color-row';
                
                // --- CUSTOM PICKER BUTTON ---
                const customBtn = document.createElement('div');
                customBtn.className = 'color-dot custom-picker-btn';
                customBtn.innerHTML = '<svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3"><line x1="12" x2="12" y1="5" y2="19"/><line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"/></svg>';
                customBtn.onclick = () => {
                    scrollToSlice(i);
                    const targetBg = state.elements.find(e => e.isBackground && e.sliceIndex === i);
                    if(targetBg) {
                        openColorPicker(targetBg.bg, (newColor) => {
                            targetBg.bg = newColor;
                            renderCanvas();
                            window.myop_cta_handler('CHANGE_BG_COLOR', { color: newColor, slice: i });
                        });
                    }
                };
                palette.appendChild(customBtn);
                // ----------------------------

                colors.forEach(color => {
                    const dot = document.createElement('div');
                    dot.className = `color-dot ${currentBg === color ? 'active' : ''}`;
                    dot.style.backgroundColor = color;
                    dot.onclick = () => {
                        scrollToSlice(i);
                        const targetBg = state.elements.find(e => e.isBackground && e.sliceIndex === i);
                        if(targetBg) {
                            targetBg.bg = color;
                            renderCanvas();
                            // Re-render colors to update 'active' class state
                            renderColors(colors);
                            window.myop_cta_handler('CHANGE_BG_COLOR', { color, slice: i });
                        }
                    };
                    palette.appendChild(dot);
                });
                
                row.appendChild(palette);
                container.appendChild(row);
            }
        }

        function applyLayout(type) {
            state.currentLayout = type; 
            const { width, height } = RATIOS[state.ratio];
            const slideW = width;
            const slideH = height;
            
            // --- HARVESTING EXISTING CONTENT ---
            const currentImages = state.elements.filter(e => e.type === 'image').map(e => ({
                src: e.src, 
                cropX: e.cropX, 
                cropY: e.cropY, 
                cropZoom: e.cropZoom
            }));
            const configImages = (appConfig.images || []).map(url => ({ 
                src: url, cropX: 50, cropY: 50, cropZoom: 1 
            }));
            
            const imagePool = [...currentImages];
            configImages.forEach(cfg => {
                if(!imagePool.find(p => p.src === cfg.src)) imagePool.push(cfg);
            });
            
            const textPool = state.elements.filter(e => e.type === 'text').map(e => ({
                content: e.content,
                color: e.color,
                fontFamily: e.fontFamily
            }));

            const existingBgs = [];
            for(let i=0; i<state.slideCount; i++) {
                const found = state.elements.find(e => e.isBackground && e.sliceIndex === i);
                if(found) existingBgs[i] = found.bg;
            }
            
            let imgIdx = 0;
            let txtIdx = 0;
            const newElements = [];

            const createBackgrounds = (defaultColor) => {
                for(let i=0; i<state.slideCount; i++) {
                    let bg = existingBgs[i];
                    if (!bg) {
                        bg = defaultColor;
                        if(type === 'editorial') bg = i % 2 === 0 ? '#F4F4F5' : '#FFFFFF';
                    }
                    newElements.push({ 
                        id: 'bg-'+i, type: 'shape', isBackground: true, sliceIndex: i, 
                        bg: bg, x: i * slideW, y: 0, width: slideW, height: slideH, zIndex: -1, locked: true 
                    });
                }
            };

            const getNextImage = () => {
                if (imgIdx < imagePool.length) {
                    const data = imagePool[imgIdx++];
                    return { 
                        type: 'image', 
                        src: data.src, 
                        cropX: data.cropX, 
                        cropY: data.cropY, 
                        cropZoom: data.cropZoom, 
                        isPlaceholder: false 
                    };
                }
                return { type: 'shape', bg: '#27272a', isPlaceholder: true };
            };

            const getNextText = (defaultContent, defaultColor) => {
                if (txtIdx < textPool.length) {
                    const txt = textPool[txtIdx++];
                    return { 
                        type: 'text', 
                        content: txt.content, 
                        color: txt.color || defaultColor,
                        fontFamily: txt.fontFamily 
                    };
                }
                return { type: 'text', content: defaultContent, color: defaultColor };
            };

            if (type === 'editorial') {
                createBackgrounds('#FFFFFF');
                for (let i = 0; i < state.slideCount; i++) {
                    if (i === 0) {
                        const txt = getNextText("MINIMAL\nESTHETIC", '#000000');
                        const txtEl = { 
                            id: generateId(), ...txt, 
                            x: i * slideW + 100, y: 200, width: 600, height: 300, 
                            fontSize: 120, fontFamily: txt.fontFamily || 'serif', zIndex: 2 
                        };
                        if(txtEl.type === 'text') autoMeasureText(txtEl);
                        newElements.push(txtEl);
                        const img = getNextImage();
                        newElements.push({ id: generateId(), ...img, x: i * slideW + 100, y: 600, width: slideW - 200, height: slideH - 700, zIndex: 1 });
                    } else {
                        const img = getNextImage();
                        newElements.push({ id: generateId(), ...img, x: i * slideW + 50, y: 150, width: slideW - 100, height: slideH - 300, zIndex: 1 });
                        newElements.push({ id: generateId(), type: 'text', content: `0${i+1}`, x: i * slideW + 50, y: 50, width: 200, height: 100, fontSize: 40, color: '#000000', fontFamily: 'sans-serif', zIndex: 2 });
                    }
                }
            } else if (type === 'bold') {
                createBackgrounds('#000000');
                for (let i = 0; i < state.slideCount; i++) {
                     const img = getNextImage();
                     newElements.push({ id: generateId(), ...img, x: i * slideW, y: 200, width: slideW, height: slideH - 400, zIndex: 1 });
                }
                const txt = getNextText("BOLD VISUALS", '#FFFFFF');
                const txtEl = { 
                    id: generateId(), ...txt, 
                    x: 100, y: 100, width: slideW * 1.5, height: 300, 
                    fontSize: 180, fontFamily: txt.fontFamily || 'sans-serif', zIndex: 3 
                };
                if(txtEl.type === 'text') autoMeasureText(txtEl);
                newElements.push(txtEl);
            } else if (type === 'grid') {
                 createBackgrounds('#18181b');
                 for (let i = 0; i < state.slideCount; i++) {
                     const img1 = getNextImage();
                     newElements.push({ id: generateId(), ...img1, x: i * slideW + 50, y: 50, width: slideW - 100, height: (slideH/2) - 75, zIndex: 1 });
                     const img2 = getNextImage();
                     newElements.push({ id: generateId(), ...img2, x: i * slideW + 50, y: (slideH/2) + 25, width: slideW - 100, height: (slideH/2) - 75, zIndex: 1 });
                 }
            } else if (type === 'cards') {
                createBackgrounds('#f4f4f5');
                for (let i = 0; i < state.slideCount; i++) {
                    newElements.push({ id: generateId(), type: 'shape', bg: '#ffffff', x: i * slideW + 100, y: 200, width: slideW - 200, height: slideH - 400, zIndex: 0 });
                    const img = getNextImage();
                    newElements.push({ id: generateId(), ...img, x: i * slideW + 150, y: 250, width: slideW - 300, height: slideW - 300, zIndex: 1 });
                    const txt = getNextText("Card Title", '#000000');
                    newElements.push({ 
                        id: generateId(), ...txt, 
                        x: i * slideW + 150, y: slideH - 400, width: slideW - 300, height: 100, 
                        fontSize: 60, fontFamily: txt.fontFamily || 'sans-serif', zIndex: 2 
                    });
                }
            }
            // --- NEW LAYOUTS ---
            else if (type === 'clean') {
                createBackgrounds('#FFFFFF');
                for (let i = 0; i < state.slideCount; i++) {
                    const img = getNextImage();
                    newElements.push({ id: generateId(), ...img, x: i * slideW + (slideW * 0.2), y: slideH * 0.2, width: slideW * 0.6, height: slideH * 0.6, zIndex: 1 });
                }
            }
            else if (type === 'offset') {
                createBackgrounds('#18181b');
                for (let i = 0; i < state.slideCount; i++) {
                    const img = getNextImage();
                    newElements.push({ id: generateId(), ...img, x: i * slideW + 50, y: 50, width: slideW * 0.7, height: slideH * 0.6, zIndex: 1 });
                    const txt = getNextText("Balance", '#FFFFFF');
                    newElements.push({ id: generateId(), ...txt, x: i * slideW + (slideW * 0.4), y: slideH * 0.7, width: slideW * 0.5, height: 100, fontSize: 80, fontFamily: 'sans-serif', zIndex: 2 });
                }
            }
            else if (type === 'triptych') {
                createBackgrounds('#000000');
                for (let i = 0; i < state.slideCount; i++) {
                    const h3 = slideH / 3;
                    const img1 = getNextImage();
                    newElements.push({ id: generateId(), ...img1, x: i * slideW, y: 0, width: slideW, height: h3 - 10, zIndex: 1 });
                    const img2 = getNextImage();
                    newElements.push({ id: generateId(), ...img2, x: i * slideW, y: h3, width: slideW, height: h3 - 10, zIndex: 1 });
                    const img3 = getNextImage();
                    newElements.push({ id: generateId(), ...img3, x: i * slideW, y: h3 * 2, width: slideW, height: h3, zIndex: 1 });
                }
            }
            else if (type === 'quad') {
                createBackgrounds('#222');
                for (let i = 0; i < state.slideCount; i++) {
                    const w2 = slideW / 2;
                    const h2 = slideH / 2;
                    const img1 = getNextImage();
                    newElements.push({ id: generateId(), ...img1, x: i * slideW, y: 0, width: w2 - 5, height: h2 - 5, zIndex: 1 });
                    const img2 = getNextImage();
                    newElements.push({ id: generateId(), ...img2, x: i * slideW + w2, y: 0, width: w2, height: h2 - 5, zIndex: 1 });
                    const img3 = getNextImage();
                    newElements.push({ id: generateId(), ...img3, x: i * slideW, y: h2, width: w2 - 5, height: h2, zIndex: 1 });
                    const img4 = getNextImage();
                    newElements.push({ id: generateId(), ...img4, x: i * slideW + w2, y: h2, width: w2, height: h2, zIndex: 1 });
                }
            }
            else if (type === 'mosaic') {
                createBackgrounds('#111');
                for (let i = 0; i < state.slideCount; i++) {
                    const w2 = slideW / 2;
                    const h2 = slideH / 2;
                    // Left vertical half
                    const img1 = getNextImage();
                    newElements.push({ id: generateId(), ...img1, x: i * slideW, y: 0, width: w2 - 5, height: slideH, zIndex: 1 });
                    // Right split
                    const img2 = getNextImage();
                    newElements.push({ id: generateId(), ...img2, x: i * slideW + w2, y: 0, width: w2, height: h2 - 5, zIndex: 1 });
                    const img3 = getNextImage();
                    newElements.push({ id: generateId(), ...img3, x: i * slideW + w2, y: h2, width: w2, height: h2, zIndex: 1 });
                }
            }
            else if (type === 'statement') {
                createBackgrounds('#000000');
                for (let i = 0; i < state.slideCount; i++) {
                    const txt = getNextText("MAKE A\nSTATEMENT", '#FFFFFF');
                    newElements.push({ id: generateId(), ...txt, x: i * slideW + 50, y: slideH/2 - 150, width: slideW - 100, height: 300, fontSize: 140, fontFamily: 'sans-serif', zIndex: 2 });
                }
            }
            else if (type === 'overlap') {
                createBackgrounds('#f4f4f5');
                for (let i = 0; i < state.slideCount; i++) {
                    // Shape behind
                    newElements.push({ id: generateId(), type: 'shape', bg: '#fbbf24', x: i * slideW + 100, y: 200, width: slideW - 200, height: slideH - 400, zIndex: 0 });
                    // Image offset
                    const img = getNextImage();
                    newElements.push({ id: generateId(), ...img, x: i * slideW + 150, y: 250, width: slideW - 300, height: slideH - 500, zIndex: 1 });
                    const txt = getNextText("Overlay", '#000000');
                    newElements.push({ id: generateId(), ...txt, x: i * slideW + 100, y: slideH - 300, width: slideW - 200, height: 100, fontSize: 80, fontFamily: 'sans-serif', zIndex: 2 });
                }
            }
            else if (type === 'border') {
                createBackgrounds('#27272a');
                for (let i = 0; i < state.slideCount; i++) {
                    // Border shape (simulated by larger rect behind)
                    newElements.push({ id: generateId(), type: 'shape', bg: '#ffffff', x: i * slideW + 50, y: 50, width: slideW - 100, height: slideH - 100, zIndex: 0 });
                    const img = getNextImage();
                    // Image inside
                    newElements.push({ id: generateId(), ...img, x: i * slideW + 70, y: 70, width: slideW - 140, height: slideH - 140, zIndex: 1 });
                }
            }

            state.elements = newElements;
            state.isCropping = false;
            renderCanvas();
            closePanels();
            window.myop_cta_handler('APPLY_LAYOUT', { type });
        }

        function syncDOM(id) {
            const el = state.elements.find(e => e.id === id);
            if (!el) return;
            const domEl = document.getElementById(`el-${id}`);
            const selBox = document.getElementById('selection-box');
            const transform = `rotate(${el.rotation}deg)`;
            const left = `${el.x}px`;
            const top = `${el.y}px`;
            const width = `${el.width}px`;
            const height = `${el.height}px`;
            
            if(domEl) {
                domEl.style.left = left;
                domEl.style.top = top;
                domEl.style.width = width;
                domEl.style.height = height;
                domEl.style.transform = transform;
                if (el.type === 'text') {
                     const textContent = domEl.querySelector('.element-content.text');
                     if(textContent) {
                         textContent.style.fontSize = `${el.fontSize}px`;
                         textContent.style.color = el.color;
                     }
                } else if (el.type === 'image') {
                     const img = domEl.querySelector('img');
                     if(img) {
                         img.style.transform = `scale(${el.cropZoom || 1})`;
                         img.style.transformOrigin = `${el.cropX || 50}% ${el.cropY || 50}%`;
                     }
                } else if (el.type === 'shape' && el.isBackground) {
                    const bgDiv = domEl.querySelector('.element-content');
                    if(bgDiv) bgDiv.style.background = el.bg;
                }
            }
            if (selBox) {
                selBox.style.left = left;
                selBox.style.top = top;
                selBox.style.width = width;
                selBox.style.height = height;
                selBox.style.transform = transform;
            }
        }

        function renderCanvas() {
            const container = document.getElementById('canvas-container');
            const wrapper = document.getElementById('canvas-wrapper');
            const { width, height } = RATIOS[state.ratio];
            const totalWidth = width * state.slideCount;
            
            // Use stored state.viewScale instead of recalculating
            const scale = state.viewScale;

            container.style.width = `${totalWidth}px`;
            container.style.height = `${height}px`;
            container.style.transform = `scale(${scale})`;
            wrapper.style.transform = `translateX(${state.panX}px)`;

            const layerEl = document.getElementById('layer-elements');
            layerEl.innerHTML = '';
            
            state.elements.sort((a,b) => (a.zIndex||0) - (b.zIndex||0)).forEach(el => {
                const node = document.createElement('div');
                node.className = `element`; 
                node.id = `el-${el.id}`;
                node.style.left = `${el.x}px`;
                node.style.top = `${el.y}px`;
                node.style.width = `${el.width}px`;
                node.style.height = `${el.height}px`;
                node.style.transform = `rotate(${el.rotation || 0}deg)`;
                node.style.zIndex = el.zIndex || 1; 
                
                if (el.type === 'text') {
                    node.innerHTML = `<div class="element-content text" style="font-size: ${el.fontSize}px; color: ${el.color}; font-family: ${el.fontFamily || 'sans-serif'}; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; text-align: center; white-space: pre;">${el.content}</div>`;
                } else if (el.type === 'image') {
                    const cropX = el.cropX !== undefined ? el.cropX : 50;
                    const cropY = el.cropY !== undefined ? el.cropY : 50;
                    const zoom = el.cropZoom || 1;
                    node.innerHTML = `<div class="element-content"><img src="${el.src}" draggable="false" style="object-fit: cover; transform-origin: ${cropX}% ${cropY}%; transform: scale(${zoom});"/></div>`;
                } else if (el.type === 'shape') {
                    if (el.isPlaceholder) {
                        node.innerHTML = `<div class="element-content" style="background:${el.bg}; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; opacity: 0.5; border: 2px dashed #555;"><span style="font-size:10px; color: #aaa; font-weight:bold;">IMAGE SLOT</span></div>`;
                    } else {
                        node.innerHTML = `<div class="element-content" style="background:${el.bg}"></div>`;
                    }
                }
                
                if (!el.locked) {
                    node.addEventListener('pointerdown', (e) => { 
                        // CHANGE: Let bubble if picking
                        if (state.isPickingColor) return;
                        // Only start drag if ALREADY selected
                        if (state.activeElementId === el.id) {
                            e.stopPropagation();
                            if(e.pointerType === 'mouse') handleMouseDown(e, el); 
                        } else {
                            // Let bubble to workspace for panning
                        }
                    });
                    
                    node.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => { 
                        // CHANGE: Let bubble if picking
                        if (state.isPickingColor) return;
                        // Only start drag if ALREADY selected
                        if (state.activeElementId === el.id) {
                            e.stopPropagation();
                            handleTouchStart(e, el); 
                        } else {
                            // Let bubble to workspace
                        }
                    }, {passive: false});

                    node.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                        // CHANGE: Let bubble if picking
                        if (state.isPickingColor) return;
                        e.stopPropagation();
                        // If we panned, don't select
                        if (wasCanvasPanning) return;
                        
                        if (state.activeElementId !== el.id) {
                            state.activeElementId = el.id;
                            renderCanvas();
                        }
                    });
                }
                layerEl.appendChild(node);
            });
            renderInteraction();
        }

        function renderGuides() {
            const container = document.getElementById('guides-container');
            container.innerHTML = '';
            for(let i=0; i<state.slideCount; i++) {
                const guide = document.createElement('div');
                guide.className = 'guide-col';
                guide.innerHTML = `<div class="guide-label"><small>Slide</small><strong>0${i+1}</strong></div>`;
                container.appendChild(guide);
            }
        }

        function renderInteraction() {
            const qa = document.getElementById('quick-actions');
            const slider = document.getElementById('crop-slider-container');
            const cropBtn = document.getElementById('qa-crop');
            const cropDone = document.getElementById('qa-crop-done');
            const selBox = document.getElementById('selection-box');
            const editColorBtn = document.getElementById('qa-color');
            const deselectBtn = document.getElementById('qa-deselect'); // New
            
            const stopProp = (e) => e.stopPropagation();
            qa.addEventListener('pointerdown', stopProp);
            qa.addEventListener('mousedown', stopProp);
            qa.addEventListener('touchstart', stopProp, {passive: false});
            
            if (!state.activeElementId) {
                qa.classList.add('hidden');
                slider.classList.add('hidden');
                if(selBox) selBox.classList.add('hidden');
                return;
            }
            const el = state.elements.find(e => e.id === state.activeElementId);
            if (!el || el.locked) {
                qa.classList.add('hidden');
                if(selBox) selBox.classList.add('hidden');
                return;
            }

            qa.classList.remove('hidden');
            if(selBox) selBox.classList.remove('hidden');
            
            const isText = el.type === 'text';
            const isImage = el.type === 'image';
            document.getElementById('qa-edit-text').style.display = isText ? 'block' : 'none';
            editColorBtn.style.display = isText ? 'block' : 'none';
            
            // Image specific controls
            if (isImage) {
                cropBtn.style.display = state.isCropping ? 'none' : 'block';
                cropDone.classList.toggle('hidden', !state.isCropping);
                slider.classList.toggle('hidden', !state.isCropping);
                if(state.isCropping) document.getElementById('crop-slider').value = el.cropZoom || 1;
                // In cropping mode, hide general deselect
                deselectBtn.style.display = state.isCropping ? 'none' : 'block';
            } else {
                cropBtn.style.display = 'none';
                cropDone.classList.add('hidden');
                slider.classList.add('hidden');
                deselectBtn.style.display = 'block';
            }

            if(selBox && !state.isCropping) {
                 selBox.style.left = `${el.x}px`;
                 selBox.style.top = `${el.y}px`;
                 selBox.style.width = `${el.width}px`;
                 selBox.style.height = `${el.height}px`;
                 selBox.style.transform = `rotate(${el.rotation || 0}deg)`;
            } else if (selBox) {
                 selBox.classList.add('hidden');
            }
        }
        
        function setupInteractionHandlers() {
             const selBox = document.getElementById('selection-box');
             if(!selBox) return;
             const rotHandle = selBox.querySelector('.handle-rotate');
             if(rotHandle) {
                 rotHandle.addEventListener('pointerdown', (e) => { 
                     e.stopPropagation();
                     if(e.pointerType === 'mouse') handleTransformStart(e, 'rotate', null, false); 
                 });
                 rotHandle.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => { 
                     e.stopPropagation();
                     handleTransformStart(e, 'rotate', null, true); 
                 }, {passive: false});
             }
             const handles = selBox.querySelectorAll('.handle:not(.handle-rotate)');
             handles.forEach(h => {
                 const classes = h.className.split(' ');
                 const pos = classes.find(c => c.startsWith('handle-')).replace('handle-', '');
                 h.addEventListener('pointerdown', (e) => { 
                     e.stopPropagation();
                     if(e.pointerType === 'mouse') handleTransformStart(e, 'scale', pos, false); 
                 });
                 h.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => { 
                     e.stopPropagation();
                     handleTransformStart(e, 'scale', pos, true); 
                 }, {passive: false});
             });
        }

        // --- NEW: WORKSPACE PANNING LOGIC ---
        function setupWorkspacePan() {
            const workspace = document.getElementById('workspace');
            
            workspace.addEventListener('pointerdown', startWorkspacePan);
            workspace.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
                startWorkspacePan(e, true);
            }, {passive: false});
        }

        function startWorkspacePan(e, isTouch) {
        // If touching UI elements, ignore
        if(e.target.closest('.quick-actions') || e.target.closest('.panel') || e.target.closest('.dock')) return;
        
        // Reset pan tracking
        wasCanvasPanning = false;
        
        if (isTouch && e.touches.length === 2) {
        gestureState.mode = 'pinch-workspace';
        const dist = Math.hypot(e.touches[0].clientX - e.touches[1].clientX, e.touches[0].clientY - e.touches[1].clientY);
        gestureState.startDist = dist;
        gestureState.startScale = state.viewScale;
        } else {
        gestureState.mode = 'pan-workspace';
        const clientX = isTouch ? e.touches[0].clientX : e.clientX;
        const clientY = isTouch ? e.touches[0].clientY : e.clientY;
        gestureState.startClientX = clientX;
        gestureState.startClientY = clientY; // Added: Capture Y for distance check
        gestureState.startPanX = state.panX;
        }
        
        if (isTouch) {
        document.addEventListener('touchmove', handleWorkspaceMove, { passive: false });
        document.addEventListener('touchend', endWorkspacePan);
        } else {
        document.addEventListener('pointermove', handleWorkspaceMove);
        document.addEventListener('pointerup', endWorkspacePan);
        }
        }
        
        function handleWorkspaceMove(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        
        // Check for pinch first
        if (gestureState.mode === 'pinch-workspace' && e.touches.length === 2) {
        wasCanvasPanning = true; // Pinches are always ops
        const dist = Math.hypot(e.touches[0].clientX - e.touches[1].clientX, e.touches[0].clientY - e.touches[1].clientY);
        const scale = dist / gestureState.startDist;
        
        let newScale = gestureState.startScale * scale;
        newScale = Math.max(0.1, Math.min(5, newScale));
        
        state.viewScale = newScale;
        document.getElementById('canvas-container').style.transform = `scale(${newScale})`;
        return;
        }
        
        if (gestureState.mode === 'pan-workspace') {
        const isTouch = e.touches && e.touches.length > 0;
        if(isTouch && e.touches.length > 1) return;
        
        const clientX = isTouch ? e.touches[0].clientX : e.clientX;
        const clientY = isTouch ? e.touches[0].clientY : e.clientY;
        
        // --- FIX: THRESHOLD CHECK ---
        // Only mark as panning if moved > 6px total
        if (!wasCanvasPanning) {
        const dist = Math.hypot(clientX - gestureState.startClientX, clientY - gestureState.startClientY);
        if (dist > 6) {
        wasCanvasPanning = true;
        }
        }
        
        // Only move visuals if we passed the threshold
        if (wasCanvasPanning) {
        const deltaX = clientX - gestureState.startClientX;
        state.panX = gestureState.startPanX + deltaX;
        document.getElementById('canvas-wrapper').style.transform = `translateX(${state.panX}px)`;
        }
        }
        }

        function endWorkspacePan() {
            gestureState.mode = 'none';
            document.removeEventListener('touchmove', handleWorkspaceMove);
            document.removeEventListener('touchend', endWorkspacePan);
            document.removeEventListener('pointermove', handleWorkspaceMove);
            document.removeEventListener('pointerup', endWorkspacePan);
        }
        // -------------------------------------

        // --- TOUCH HANDLING ---
        function handleTouchStart(e, el, overrideMode) {
            // e.stopPropagation() is handled in event listener setup based on selection state
            const container = document.getElementById('canvas-container');
            const rect = container.getBoundingClientRect();
            const scale = state.viewScale;

            if (e.touches.length === 1) {
                state.activeElementId = el.id;
                gestureState.mode = overrideMode || (state.isCropping ? 'crop-pan' : 'drag');
                if(overrideMode) gestureState.handle = arguments[3]; 
                const touchX = (e.touches[0].clientX - rect.left) / scale;
                const touchY = (e.touches[0].clientY - rect.top) / scale;
                gestureState.offsetX = touchX - el.x;
                gestureState.offsetY = touchY - el.y;
                gestureState.startX = e.touches[0].clientX;
                gestureState.startY = e.touches[0].clientY;
                gestureState.initialEl = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(el));

            } else if (e.touches.length === 2) {
                state.activeElementId = el.id;
                gestureState.mode = state.isCropping ? 'crop-zoom' : 'gesture';
                gestureState.initialEl = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(el));
                gestureState.startDist = Math.hypot(e.touches[0].clientX - e.touches[1].clientX, e.touches[0].clientY - e.touches[1].clientY);
                gestureState.startAngle = Math.atan2(e.touches[0].clientY - e.touches[1].clientY, e.touches[0].clientX - e.touches[1].clientX);
            }
            renderInteraction();
            document.addEventListener('touchmove', handleTouchMove, { passive: false });
            document.addEventListener('touchend', handleTouchEnd);
        }

        function handleTouchMove(e) {
            if (gestureState.mode === 'none' || gestureState.mode === 'pan-workspace' || gestureState.mode === 'pinch-workspace') return;
            e.preventDefault(); 
            e.stopPropagation();

            if (e.touches.length === 1) {
                const container = document.getElementById('canvas-container');
                const rect = container.getBoundingClientRect();
                const scale = state.viewScale;
                const el = state.elements.find(x => x.id === state.activeElementId);
                if(!el) return;

                if(gestureState.mode === 'drag') {
                    // Snapping logic is inside applyGestureTransform now for consistency
                    const dx = (e.touches[0].clientX - gestureState.startX) / state.viewScale;
                    const dy = (e.touches[0].clientY - gestureState.startY) / state.viewScale;
                    applyGestureTransform(dx, dy, e.touches[0].clientX, e.touches[0].clientY);
                } 
                else if (['crop-pan', 'scale', 'rotate'].includes(gestureState.mode)) {
                     const dx = (e.touches[0].clientX - gestureState.startX) / state.viewScale;
                     const dy = (e.touches[0].clientY - gestureState.startY) / state.viewScale;
                     applyGestureTransform(dx, dy, e.touches[0].clientX, e.touches[0].clientY);
                }
            }
            else if (e.touches.length === 2) {
                 if (gestureState.mode !== 'gesture' && gestureState.mode !== 'crop-zoom') {
                    gestureState.mode = state.isCropping ? 'crop-zoom' : 'gesture';
                    gestureState.initialEl = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(state.elements.find(x => x.id === state.activeElementId)));
                    gestureState.startDist = Math.hypot(e.touches[0].clientX - e.touches[1].clientX, e.touches[0].clientY - e.touches[1].clientY);
                    gestureState.startAngle = Math.atan2(e.touches[0].clientY - e.touches[1].clientY, e.touches[0].clientX - e.touches[1].clientX);
                }

                const currentDist = Math.hypot(e.touches[0].clientX - e.touches[1].clientX, e.touches[0].clientY - e.touches[1].clientY);
                const currentAngle = Math.atan2(e.touches[0].clientY - e.touches[1].clientY, e.touches[0].clientX - e.touches[1].clientX);
                const scale = currentDist / gestureState.startDist;
                const el = state.elements.find(x => x.id === state.activeElementId);
                if(!el) return;
                const init = gestureState.initialEl;

                if (gestureState.mode === 'crop-zoom') {
                     el.cropZoom = Math.max(1, Math.min(3, (init.cropZoom || 1) * scale));
                } else {
                    el.width = init.width * scale;
                    el.height = init.height * scale;
                    el.x = init.x - (el.width - init.width)/2;
                    el.y = init.y - (el.height - init.height)/2;
                    const rotDelta = (currentAngle - gestureState.startAngle) * (180/Math.PI);
                    
                    let newRotation = (init.rotation || 0) + rotDelta;
                    
                    // Snap to 45 degree increments
                    const snapThreshold = 5;
                    const nearest = Math.round(newRotation / 45) * 45;
                    if (Math.abs(newRotation - nearest) < snapThreshold) {
                        newRotation = nearest;
                    }
                    
                    el.rotation = newRotation;
                    
                    if(el.type === 'text') el.fontSize = init.fontSize * scale;
                }
            }
            syncDOM(state.activeElementId);
        }

        function handleTouchEnd(e) {
            clearSnapGuides(); // Clear guides on end
            if (e.touches.length === 0) {
                gestureState.mode = 'none';
                document.removeEventListener('touchmove', handleTouchMove);
                document.removeEventListener('touchend', handleTouchEnd);
                renderCanvas(); 
            } else if (e.touches.length === 1) {
                const el = state.elements.find(x => x.id === state.activeElementId);
                const container = document.getElementById('canvas-container');
                const rect = container.getBoundingClientRect();
                const scale = state.viewScale;
                
                gestureState.mode = state.isCropping ? 'crop-pan' : 'drag';
                const touchX = (e.touches[0].clientX - rect.left) / scale;
                const touchY = (e.touches[0].clientY - rect.top) / scale;
                gestureState.offsetX = touchX - el.x;
                gestureState.offsetY = touchY - el.y;
                gestureState.startX = e.touches[0].clientX;
                gestureState.startY = e.touches[0].clientY;
                gestureState.initialEl = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(el));
            }
        }
        
        function handleTransformStart(e, mode, handle, isTouch) {
            e.stopPropagation();
            if(isTouch && e.preventDefault) e.preventDefault();
            const el = state.elements.find(x => x.id === state.activeElementId);
            if(!el) return;
            gestureState.mode = mode;
            gestureState.handle = handle;
            gestureState.startX = isTouch ? e.touches[0].clientX : e.clientX;
            gestureState.startY = isTouch ? e.touches[0].clientY : e.clientY;
            gestureState.initialEl = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(el));
            
            if (isTouch) {
                document.addEventListener('touchmove', handleHandleTouchMove, { passive: false });
                document.addEventListener('touchend', handleHandleTouchEnd);
            } else {
                document.addEventListener('pointermove', handleMouseMove);
                document.addEventListener('pointerup', handleMouseUp);
            }
        }

        function handleHandleTouchMove(e) {
             e.preventDefault();
             e.stopPropagation();
             const dx = (e.touches[0].clientX - gestureState.startX) / state.viewScale;
             const dy = (e.touches[0].clientY - gestureState.startY) / state.viewScale;
             applyGestureTransform(dx, dy, e.touches[0].clientX, e.touches[0].clientY);
             syncDOM(state.activeElementId);
        }

        function handleHandleTouchEnd() {
             clearSnapGuides();
             document.removeEventListener('touchmove', handleHandleTouchMove);
             document.removeEventListener('touchend', handleHandleTouchEnd);
             renderCanvas();
        }

        // MOUSE HANDLERS
        function handleMouseDown(e, el) {
            state.activeElementId = el.id;
            gestureState.mode = state.isCropping ? 'crop-pan' : 'drag';
            gestureState.startX = e.clientX;
            gestureState.startY = e.clientY;
            
            // Calculate offsets specifically for drag
            const container = document.getElementById('canvas-container');
            const rect = container.getBoundingClientRect();
            const scale = state.viewScale;
            const mouseX = (e.clientX - rect.left) / scale;
            const mouseY = (e.clientY - rect.top) / scale;
            gestureState.offsetX = mouseX - el.x;
            gestureState.offsetY = mouseY - el.y;
            
            gestureState.initialEl = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(el));
            renderCanvas(); 
            document.addEventListener('pointermove', handleMouseMove);
            document.addEventListener('pointerup', handleMouseUp);
        }

        function handleMouseMove(e) {
            if (!gestureState.mode) return;
            e.preventDefault();
            const dx = (e.clientX - gestureState.startX) / state.viewScale;
            const dy = (e.clientY - gestureState.startY) / state.viewScale;
            applyGestureTransform(dx, dy, e.clientX, e.clientY);
            syncDOM(state.activeElementId);
        }

        function handleMouseUp() {
            clearSnapGuides();
            gestureState.mode = 'none';
            document.removeEventListener('pointermove', handleMouseMove);
            document.removeEventListener('pointerup', handleMouseUp);
            renderCanvas();
        }

        // --- SNAP LOGIC ---
        function getSnapLines() {
            const { width, height } = RATIOS[state.ratio];
            const vLines = [];
            // Slide borders
            for (let i = 0; i <= state.slideCount; i++) vLines.push(i * width);
            const hLines = [0, height, height / 2]; // Top, Bottom, Middle
            return { vLines, hLines };
        }

        function closestSnap(value, lines, threshold) {
            let best = null;
            let minDiff = threshold;
            for (const line of lines) {
                const diff = Math.abs(value - line);
                if (diff < minDiff) {
                    minDiff = diff;
                    best = line;
                }
            }
            return best;
        }

        function updateSnapGuides(vLine, hLine) {
            const container = document.getElementById('snap-layer');
            container.innerHTML = '';
            
            if (vLine !== null) {
                const div = document.createElement('div');
                div.className = 'snap-guide-v';
                div.style.left = `${vLine}px`;
                container.appendChild(div);
            }
            if (hLine !== null) {
                const div = document.createElement('div');
                div.className = 'snap-guide-h';
                div.style.top = `${hLine}px`;
                container.appendChild(div);
            }
        }

        function clearSnapGuides() {
            document.getElementById('snap-layer').innerHTML = '';
        }

        function applyGestureTransform(dx, dy, clientX, clientY) {
            const el = state.elements.find(x => x.id === state.activeElementId);
            const init = gestureState.initialEl;
            if(!el || !init) return;

            // Updated: Reduced Threshold to 5px (was 15px) for tighter snapping
            const SNAP_THRESHOLD = 5 / state.viewScale;
            const { vLines, hLines } = getSnapLines();
            let snappedV = null;
            let snappedH = null;

            if (gestureState.mode === 'drag') {
                // Calculate tentative new position
                let newX = init.x + dx;
                let newY = init.y + dy;

                // Check Horizontal Snap (X) - Left, Right, Center
                const leftSnap = closestSnap(newX, vLines, SNAP_THRESHOLD);
                const rightSnap = closestSnap(newX + init.width, vLines, SNAP_THRESHOLD);
                const centerSnap = closestSnap(newX + init.width / 2, vLines, SNAP_THRESHOLD);

                if (leftSnap !== null) {
                    newX = leftSnap;
                    snappedV = leftSnap;
                } else if (rightSnap !== null) {
                    newX = rightSnap - init.width;
                    snappedV = rightSnap;
                } else if (centerSnap !== null) {
                    newX = centerSnap - init.width / 2;
                    snappedV = centerSnap;
                }

                // Check Vertical Snap (Y) - Top, Bottom, Center
                const topSnap = closestSnap(newY, hLines, SNAP_THRESHOLD);
                const bottomSnap = closestSnap(newY + init.height, hLines, SNAP_THRESHOLD);
                const midSnap = closestSnap(newY + init.height / 2, hLines, SNAP_THRESHOLD);

                if (topSnap !== null) {
                    newY = topSnap;
                    snappedH = topSnap;
                } else if (bottomSnap !== null) {
                    newY = bottomSnap - init.height;
                    snappedH = bottomSnap;
                } else if (midSnap !== null) {
                    newY = midSnap - init.height / 2;
                    snappedH = midSnap;
                }

                el.x = newX;
                el.y = newY;
            
            } else if (gestureState.mode === 'crop-pan') {
                const percentX = (dx / el.width) * 100;
                const percentY = (dy / el.height) * 100;
                el.cropX = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, (init.cropX || 50) - percentX));
                el.cropY = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, (init.cropY || 50) - percentY));
            
            } else if (gestureState.mode === 'rotate') {
                 const domEl = document.getElementById(`el-${el.id}`);
                 const rect = domEl.getBoundingClientRect();
                 const cx = rect.left + rect.width/2;
                 const cy = rect.top + rect.height/2;
                 const angle = Math.atan2(clientY - cy, clientX - cx);
                 let deg = angle * (180 / Math.PI) + 90;
                 
                 // Snap to 45 degree increments
                 const snapThreshold = 5;
                 const nearest = Math.round(deg / 45) * 45;
                 if (Math.abs(deg - nearest) < snapThreshold) {
                     deg = nearest;
                 }
                 
                 el.rotation = deg;
            
            } else if (gestureState.mode === 'scale') {
                 const angleRad = (init.rotation || 0) * (Math.PI / 180);
                 const localDx = dx * Math.cos(-angleRad) - dy * Math.sin(-angleRad);
                 
                 let scaleFactor = (init.width + localDx) / init.width;
                 
                 // Tentative dimensions
                 let newW = Math.max(20, init.width * scaleFactor);
                 let newH = Math.max(20, init.height * scaleFactor);
                 
                 // Center based scaling logic:
                 // x = init.x - (newW - init.width)/2
                 // y = init.y - (newH - init.height)/2
                 
                 let tentativeX = init.x - (newW - init.width)/2;
                 let tentativeY = init.y - (newH - init.height)/2;
                 
                 // Check Edge Snapping for Scale
                 // Left Edge
                 const leftSnap = closestSnap(tentativeX, vLines, SNAP_THRESHOLD);
                 if (leftSnap !== null) {
                     // If left edge snaps, recalculate width needed to hit that line from center
                     // dist from center = (initCenterX - leftSnap)
                     // newWidth = dist * 2
                     const initCenterX = init.x + init.width/2;
                     newW = (initCenterX - leftSnap) * 2;
                     newH = (newW / init.width) * init.height; // maintain aspect
                     snappedV = leftSnap;
                 }
                 
                 // Right Edge
                 const rightSnap = closestSnap(tentativeX + newW, vLines, SNAP_THRESHOLD);
                 if (rightSnap !== null) {
                     const initCenterX = init.x + init.width/2;
                     newW = (rightSnap - initCenterX) * 2;
                     newH = (newW / init.width) * init.height;
                     snappedV = rightSnap;
                 }
                 
                 // Top Edge
                 const topSnap = closestSnap(tentativeY, hLines, SNAP_THRESHOLD);
                 if (topSnap !== null) {
                     const initCenterY = init.y + init.height/2;
                     newH = (initCenterY - topSnap) * 2;
                     newW = (newH / init.height) * init.width;
                     snappedH = topSnap;
                 }
                 
                 // Bottom Edge
                 const bottomSnap = closestSnap(tentativeY + newH, hLines, SNAP_THRESHOLD);
                 if (bottomSnap !== null) {
                     const initCenterY = init.y + init.height/2;
                     newH = (bottomSnap - initCenterY) * 2;
                     newW = (newH / init.height) * init.width;
                     snappedH = bottomSnap;
                 }

                 el.width = newW;
                 el.height = newH;
                 el.x = init.x - (newW - init.width)/2;
                 el.y = init.y - (newH - init.height)/2;
                 
                 if(el.type === 'text') el.fontSize = init.fontSize * (newW / init.width);
            }

            updateSnapGuides(snappedV, snappedH);
        }

             state.activeElementId = null;
             state.isCropping = false;
             closePanels();

                            };
                        } else {

                            const xPos = (bestSlideIndex * width) + (width - (img.width*scale))/2;
