        async function generateSliceFiles() {
            const { width: slideW, height: slideH } = RATIOS[state.ratio];
            const totalW = slideW * state.slideCount;
            const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
            canvas.width = totalW;
            canvas.height = slideH;
            const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
            ctx.fillStyle = '#000000';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, totalW, slideH);
            const sorted = [...state.elements].sort((a,b) => (a.zIndex||0) - (b.zIndex||0));
            
            for (const el of sorted) {
                if (el.isPlaceholder) continue;
                ctx.save();
                const cx = el.x + el.width/2;
                const cy = el.y + el.height/2;
                ctx.translate(cx, cy);
                ctx.rotate((el.rotation || 0) * Math.PI / 180);
                ctx.translate(-el.width/2, -el.height/2);
                if (el.type === 'image') {
                    const img = new Image();
                    img.crossOrigin = "anonymous";
                    img.src = el.src;
                    await new Promise(r => img.onload = r);
                    const cropX = el.cropX !== undefined ? el.cropX : 50;
                    const cropY = el.cropY !== undefined ? el.cropY : 50;
                    const zoom = el.cropZoom || 1;
                    const imgRatio = img.width / img.height;
                    const boxRatio = el.width / el.height;
                    let drawW, drawH;
                    if (imgRatio > boxRatio) {
                        drawH = el.height;
                        drawW = img.width * (el.height / img.height);
                    } else {
                        drawW = el.width;
                        drawH = img.height * (el.width / img.width);
                    }
                    drawW *= zoom;
                    drawH *= zoom;
                    ctx.beginPath();
                    ctx.rect(0, 0, el.width, el.height);
                    ctx.clip();
                    const offsetX = (el.width - drawW) * (cropX / 100);
                    const offsetY = (el.height - drawH) * (cropY / 100);
                    ctx.drawImage(img, offsetX, offsetY, drawW, drawH);
                } else if (el.type === 'text') {
                     ctx.font = `${el.fontSize}px ${el.fontFamily || 'sans-serif'}`;
                     ctx.fillStyle = el.color;
                     ctx.textBaseline = 'top';
                     ctx.textAlign = 'center';
                     const lines = el.content.split('\n');
                     const lh = el.fontSize * 1.2;
                     const totalH = lines.length * lh;
                     const startY = (el.height - totalH) / 2;
                     lines.forEach((line, i) => {
                         ctx.fillText(line, el.width/2, startY + (i * lh));
                     });
                } else if (el.type === 'shape') {
                    ctx.fillStyle = el.bg;
                    ctx.fillRect(0,0, el.width, el.height);
                }
                ctx.restore();
            }
            
            const dataURLtoFile = (dataurl, filename) => {
                let arr = dataurl.split(','), mime = arr[0].match(/:(.*?);/)[1],
                    bstr = atob(arr[1]), n = bstr.length, u8arr = new Uint8Array(n);
                while(n--){ u8arr[n] = bstr.charCodeAt(n); }
                return new File([u8arr], filename, {type:mime});
            }
            const files = [];
            for (let i=0; i < state.slideCount; i++) {
                const slice = document.createElement('canvas');
                slice.width = slideW;
                slice.height = slideH;
                const sCtx = slice.getContext('2d');
                sCtx.drawImage(canvas, i*slideW, 0, slideW, slideH, 0, 0, slideW, slideH);
                const dataUrl = slice.toDataURL('image/png');
                files.push(dataURLtoFile(dataUrl, `slice-${i+1}.png`));
            }
            return files;
        }

        function findBestSliceForImage() {
            const { width } = RATIOS[state.ratio];
            const counts = new Array(state.slideCount).fill(0);
            state.elements.forEach(el => {
                if(el.type !== 'image') return;
                const idx = Math.floor((el.x + el.width/2) / width);
                if(idx >=0 && idx < state.slideCount) counts[idx]++;
            });
            return counts.indexOf(Math.min(...counts));
        }

            }
            
            document.querySelectorAll('.panel').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
            if (state.activePanel) { document.getElementById(`panel-${state.activePanel}`).classList.add('active'); }
        }

        new ResizeObserver(() => {
            // Only fit to screen if we haven't set a valid scale yet, 
            // or if we want to responsive resize (optional, but good for init)
            if (state.viewScale === 1 || state.viewScale === 0) {
                fitCanvasToScreen();
            } else {
                renderCanvas();
            }
        }).observe(document.getElementById('workspace'));
        
        document.getElementById('btn-close-app').onclick = () => {
            window.myop_cta_handler('close', {});
